name: OUR FOUNDER'S MESSAGE
message: Education is a slow & relentless process like the unfolding of a flower. both teachers and parents must co-operate to mould the students to make them ideal & responsible citizens of this country.

The student of today may become leader of tomorrow. Only by the development of a reliable character the student can lead this country in future. Only those ideals are respected and remembered in gratitude for posterity.

name: Sir
message: Education is a slow & relentless process like the unfolding of a flower. both teachers and parents must co-operate to mould the students to make them ideal & responsible citizens of this country.
